_doc: Cumulative discovery artifact contract after search plan selection and downstream discovery processing. Updated 2026-03-18 against searchDiscovery.js, discoverySearchExecution.js, and discoveryResultProcessor.js.

_pipeline_data_accumulated.schema_1: NeedSet start input from bootstrap/discovery/finalization call sites.
_pipeline_data_accumulated.schema_2: NeedSet output with field states, blockers, planner_seed, and history feedback.
_pipeline_data_accumulated.schema_3: SearchPlanningContext with focus_groups, planner limits, anti-garbage unions, learning, and previous_round_fields.
_pipeline_data_accumulated.schema_4: NeedSet planner output with search_plan_handoff, planner panel, and learning writeback.
_pipeline_data_accumulated.search_execution: raw SERP results, search attempts, search journal, internal/external search reasons.
_pipeline_data_accumulated.post_execution: SERP dedupe, hard drops, classification, soft labels, lane-based selection, optional LLM rerank, serp_explorer, and discovered URLs.

searchProfileFinal._doc: The persisted search_profile artifact written by writeSearchProfileArtifacts().

schema4_path_fields.query_rows: Array<QueryRow> - per-query metadata from the handoff adapter

fallback_path_fields.llm_queries: string[] - fallback planner query strings from planUberQueries()
fallback_path_fields.effective_host_plan: object|null - populated when host-plan search is active

execution_additions.query_rows: rows enriched with result_count, attempts, providers, and frontier_cache
execution_additions.serp_explorer: lane-aware triage breakdown and audit trail

discoverCandidateSources_return.discoveryKey: storage key for the discovery payload
discoverCandidateSources_return.candidatesKey: storage key for the candidate payload
discoverCandidateSources_return.candidates: Array<DiscoveredURL> - selected discovery rows after lane selection
discoverCandidateSources_return.candidateUrls: string[] - fed to planner.seedCandidates(...) when enabled
discoverCandidateSources_return.uber_search_plan: object|null - fallback query planner output from planUberQueries() when generated
discoverCandidateSources_return.seed_search_plan_output: object|null - Schema 4 output attached by runDiscoverySeedPlan() so finalization can reuse it without another planner call

adapter_conversion._doc: convertHandoffToExecutionPlan() turns the Schema 4 handoff into the same row-map shape used by the fallback query-planner branch.
adapter_conversion.queryRows: Array<RowObject> with query, source, target_fields, domain_hint, doc_hint, hint_source, family, group_key, and query_hash
